"title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7096023105235061774","book_info":{"abstract":"【无女主！！】
穆云飞穿越到了一个美食文化浅薄的世界当中，天天吃素菜，他表示，他快吃吐了！
好在他觉醒了神级美食系统！
煎饼果子软糯喷香，皮蛋瘦肉粥让老外爱上皮蛋！
酸辣粉让人欲罢不能，牛腩汤河粉更是被一抢而空！
美食家：我的一生已无憾了！
探店up主：这才叫美食啊，以前吃的那是什么？
老人家：吃了这十全大补汤，我直接神清气爽，飞檐走壁！
自此，他的华夏小店火遍了全球！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c25a848f8d6fe03464944c8fbeabdefb","author":"聂十三","author_id":"","book_id":"7096023105235061774","book_name":"美食绝迹了？可曾听闻华夏美食","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7096035193089163816","read_count":"940","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"454447"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"227","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,美食,无女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/89a6f91e806618d436be8aa4af4dae97~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365664&x-signature=q7hxhm0BbeMrvotPtfH4Iav5AAI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2129113156160590","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.429928e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322201424C9DF17FCAC1F1C978738"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":39,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":9,"show_pv":20091},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1656326849,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7115686300736914187","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"内容是有些枯燥，可以在其中弄点搞笑内容，但不要太多，就是额像十几章之后弄一次，我觉得弄完美食之后是可以完结，悬念不要留太多，但也不能没有，我看过一些关于开店卖东西以及做美食的，内容其实可以早就完结了，但不完结写很多，我认为美食文就是美食文，不要搞那么多复杂的东西，搞那么复杂东西，会对一些读者感到烦躁，这本书就寄了，额，以上都是我个人看法啊"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1656749938,"group_id":"7096023105235061774","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2278638165438899"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7096023105235061774","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.127898e+06"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4127,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":3},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7115684787133842179","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这才是我心目中的美食文呐，我在想是否可以弄成一个像日食记一样的视频博主，是科普美食然后还有它的做法，我觉得主角讲完一些美食的做法之后可以去旅游几天，以上是我个人看法"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1656749567,"group_id":"7096023105235061774","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜秋爱秋","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7s/92B+oXz0OOkDcd2/Xe3aOgYQIUvmI2W8D7d22pDQ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/632ca42abd084e8cb7c041e542070efc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708071&x-signature=v7Z8RUu5Yzn7GKWuJvYxwhehjpM%3D","user_id":"2278638165438899","user_name":"秋镜墨"},"expand_extra"
